characters.description: An independent cultivator and disciple of Feng Ming whose newly intensified anger is disrupting both his judgment and his cultivation. He travels with Falling Leaf, Feng's watcher, and a reluctant fire cultivator while trying to understand the danger within himself.
characters.name: Sen

characters.description: Sen's transformed Ghost Panther companion and chosen family.
characters.name: Falling Leaf

characters.description: A powerful cultivator who taught Sen and assigned a covert protector to watch over him. Though absent from the journey, Feng Ming remains one of Sen's established teachers and protectors. His past guidance continues to shape both Sen's training and the company around him.
characters.name: Feng Ming

characters.description: One of Sen's senior teachers and powerful protectors. His likely response to serious harm against Sen is enough to make informed enemies cautious. Although he remains offstage as the journey begins, his connection to Sen is an important part of the young cultivator's protection.
characters.name: Kho Jaw-Long

characters.description: Sen's formidable teacher and a nascent-soul cultivator who has recently reunited with him.
characters.name: Caihong

characters.description: A late-core covert cultivator assigned by Feng to protect Sen. She continues travelling with him, although he distrusts her after she manipulated him in an attempt to reach her estranged brother. Even so, he listens when she warns that his growing anger poses an urgent danger.
characters.name: Feng's watcher

characters.description: A lazy and vocal fire cultivator sent to travel with Sen under an agreement with the Order's matriarch. His reluctance and complaints repeatedly test Sen's already unstable temper. Sen gives him the choice to stop complaining or leave the group.
characters.name: Reluctant fire cultivator

characters.description: A Clear Spring core cultivator who previously sparred with Sen. She recognizes him when his party arrives, while she and Falling Leaf immediately regard each other with suspicion.
characters.name: Clear Spring core cultivator

characters.description: The Clear Spring cultivator travelling near Sen is revealed as a princess when capital officials recognize her. Facing a forced marriage to a dangerous noble, she gains Sen's conditional help while offering a possible route to the manual he needs.
characters.name: Princess

characters.description: The elusive leader of Clear Spring, powerful enough that Sen cannot sense his cultivation. He tests Sen's restraint and explains that the sect possesses the needed manual but cannot access it.
characters.name: Clear Spring patriarch

characters.description: A Clear Spring water cultivator protected within the sect by his family's status. Sen will not hunt him, but intends to answer any attack with lethal force.
characters.name: Hostile Clear Spring cultivator

characters.description: An ancient, aware body of water that communicates through qi and images. It broadens Sen's understanding of water and warns that merely confining his anger may leave his heart permanently hardened. It shelters him when its first attempt to share knowledge overwhelms him.
characters.name: Clear Spring

characters.description: The founder of a cult that holds people inside a protected compound. When Caihong breaks its defenses, he orders his followers to resist and tries to escape. His authority collapses as the compound's formation fails and Caihong acts to recover those held there on Sen's behalf.
characters.name: Temple of Eternity's Edge leader

characters.description: An ancient divine turtle whose guidance placed Sen on the Five-Fold Body Transformation path. Its intervention is the reason Sen began the incomplete body-cultivation method whose manual he now seeks.
characters.name: Ancient divine turtle

characters.description: An overwhelmingly powerful dragon concealed within a deliberately barren wilderness. He suppresses Sen and Falling Leaf with ease, excludes Falling Leaf from the confrontation, and declares that Sen must learn before dying.
characters.name: Wind dragon

characters.description: The leader of a spirit ox herd that shelters Sen and Falling Leaf while his injured leg heals. She explains why spirit beasts follow Sen and directs him toward a barren western region where he may find resolution or death.
characters.name: Spirit ox herd mother

characters.description: The princess's politically cautious brother. A diviner has warned him that Sen's arrival could bring either fortune or disaster, so he approaches Sen seeking peaceful relations rather than an immediate favor.
characters.name: Noble prince

characters.description: The royal father who approved the princess's unwanted marriage to Choi Zhi Peng. His decision leaves the prince looking for another way to prevent the wedding.
characters.name: King

characters.description: The royal mother who, with the king, approved the princess's unwanted marriage to Choi Zhi Peng.
characters.name: Queen

characters.description: A competing royal heir who attacks the prince during the palace confrontation, turning the exposure of the king into an immediate struggle for the throne. His intervention forces the prince to defend both his life and his claim to rule while the royal household is in crisis.
characters.name: Rival royal brother

characters.description: The House of Choi heir selected as the princess's husband. He is a powerful and cruel noble, and the arranged match places the princess at the center of a dangerous conflict between the royal family and a great house.
characters.name: Choi Zhi Peng

characters.description: A nascent-soul leader of the Steel Griffin sect who intervenes after one of its elders attacks Sen and Falling Leaf. Revealed as Feng's brother, he accepts severe punishment for the elder to prevent a wider conflict.
characters.name: Steel Griffin leader

characters.description: A Steel Griffin elder who attempts to intimidate Sen and Falling Leaf. When she prepares to attack, Sen suppresses and wounds her.
characters.name: Steel Griffin elder

characters.description: The bearded nascent-soul leader behind the Shadow Eagle Talon Syndicate. His long-range assault devastates part of the city while pursuing Sen's group, establishing him as a threat far beyond Sen's cultivation stage.
characters.name: Shadow Eagle Talon Syndicate head

characters.description: A nascent-soul sect leader and influential city power. She joins other senior cultivators in restraining the Syndicate head and supports Sen's campaign because she regards the criminal organization as a danger to the capital.
characters.name: Golden Phoenix matriarch

characters.description: A dangerous and elusive nascent-soul cultivator who may possess the final known copy of the Five-Fold Body Transformation Manual. Locating her becomes Sen's remaining lead after the capital search fails.
characters.name: Mad nascent-soul cultivator
